underlying_goal: Execute the Deacon patrol agent: check hooked work and mail, then run patrol cycles monitoring town health
friction_detail: Vapor-phase wisps couldn't be managed by normal bd commands (bd show/bd ready/bd mol burn), requiring SQL workarounds; wisp creation didn't generate steps properly on first attempt.
brief_summary: User instructed the Deacon agent to check hooks/mail and patrol; Claude executed 14 patrol cycles monitoring town health until OAuth token expired, working around wisp management issues.
